title: common-notifications
description: Telegram chat IDs + escalation routing per master brief §2.4 primitive 5. Per PRODUCT-SPEC §5.3 line 359.

operator_chat_id.description: Tenant operator Telegram chat ID; receives default-routed escalations. Loaded from _secrets.env at runtime.

operator_user_id.description: Tenant operator Telegram user ID; constrains who can resolve approval gates.

approval_surface.description: Primary surface for orange-tier approval gates per autosend-safety-policy §4.

escalation_routes.description: Per-ESC-code routing overrides. Keys = escalation codes from _shared/escalation-codes.md. Values inherit operator_chat_id when absent.

ifos_oncall_chat_id.description: IFOS-side oncall Telegram chat; receives ESC_AUTOSEND_POLICY_LOOKUP_FAILED + cross-tenant operational alerts.

default_approval_timeout_seconds.description: 4h default per autosend-safety-policy §5 ESC_AUTOSEND_NEEDS_REVIEW; timeout converts orange-tier to ESC_AUTOSEND_NEEDS_REVIEW row.
